summary: Bitcoin shows mixed signals with potential V-shaped rebound above $79k targeting $86k but bearish daily VWAP and descending channel risking drop to $76k-$72k. Altcoins and broader crypto lack fresh mentions from top analysts today, shifting focus to forex pairs like USDJPY and USD/MXN with defined targets amid CFTC positioning. Commodities like gold and silver face resistance amid rising US yields, while equities remain unmentioned in today's updates.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: BTC dumping signals immediate downside momentum and potential further declines.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: Explicitly balls deep in SOL, indicating strong long position and conviction in upside.

signals.name: Sui
signals.reason: SUI ready to rip alongside BTC coiling before CPI.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Daily and weekly VWAP bearish with target below $4270 to $3600 if support breaks, per Tickmill.

signals.name: USD/JPY
signals.reason: Daily VWAP bullish targeting 161 above 160, despite weekly bearish VWAP, per Tickmill.

signals.name: Silver
signals.reason: Pushing $90 resistance but rising US yields limit upside with expected pullback to $80 support, per DailyForex Silver forecast.
